faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Hackensack, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Hackensack range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Hackensack?
faqs.answer: Hackensack properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older Hackensack homes, while pavement ants typically nest in cracks in driveways and foundations.
